content:
# Paleomagnetism

**Summary**: The study of the record of the Earth's magnetic field in rocks.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993]] conducted a paleomagnetic study to determine Cenozoic poles for Arabia.

- [[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011]] investigated paleowind direction using cross-bed orientation in eolian dunes.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011]] investigated paleowind direction using cross-bed orientation in eolian dunes.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The Late Pliocene-Pleistocene pole position is at Lat. 86.74°N, long. 345.49°E. ([[1993-kaka|Kaka, 1993, p. 18]])

- Determined a consistent east-northeast paleowind across all fields. ([[2011-al-masrahy|AL-MASRAHY, 2011, p. 106]])
